title: The Fox & The Mosquitoes
content:
Being plagued with Mosquitoes one day,
    Said old Fox, "pray don't send them away,
    For a hungrier swarm
    Would work me more harm;
    I had rather the full ones should stay."

    There Were Politicians In �sop's Time
meaning:
Walter Crane's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Fox & The Mosquitoes"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
